title: Data Stories
subtitle: Visualizations and narratives from public datasets
author: Sunil Dhaka

stories.title: India's Urban Growth Ponzi Scheme
stories.description: India is importing America's failed suburban development model while abandoning its own traditional cities -- which already embody everything the world's best urbanists now advocate.

stories.title: The Guar Story: Rajasthan's Desert Gold
stories.description: How a drought-resistant bean from the Thar Desert connects Rajasthan's farmers to America's oil rigs -- a $2.5B commodity that's cheapest where it's grown.
